data.title: Justin Sun announced three major benefits of SunPerp: the lowest fees in the industry, real cash back on deposits, and full coverage of future airdrop points.
data.description: Justin Sun, Global Advisor to Huobi HTX and Founder of TRON, comprehensively elaborated on SunPerp's development advantages and strategic vision in the "Boundless Imagination in the DEX 2.0 Era | Special Theme Space." Sun emphasized that SunPerp will offer users three key benefits: first, it will offer the lowest contract fees in the industry; second, it will soon launch a "Deposit and Get Real Money" promotion, which will substantially refund users' transaction gas fees; and third, it will gradually implement industry-standard new user acquisition methods such as commission rebates and points. From an ecosystem strategy perspective, Sun highlighted Perp DEX as a key platform that TRON must develop. "In the future, we will partner with multiple wallet projects to ensure that all USDT transactions are conducted through SunPerp." He further analyzed industry trends and believed that Perp DEX, with its higher leverage, smoother trading experience, and deeper liquidity, will become a mainstream trading option in the future, and SunPerp is expected to become the preferred trading tool for users. SunPerp is currently in its early public beta phase, and the team is actively developing infrastructure and improving liquidity.

data.description:

data.title: On the day of listing, two addresses that received tokens from the WLFI strategic reserve wallet transferred 644.3 billion WLFI to Binance, worth $14.19 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin, two addresses that received WLFI from the WLFI strategic reserve wallet on the day of listing transferred 644.3 billion WLFI (worth $14.19 million) to Binance today. On the day of the token's launch (September 1st), the WLFI strategic reserve wallet (0xA 71) distributed 2 billion WLFI to 56 wallets, 35.714 million each. Twenty-six of these 56 wallets were exchange deposit addresses, and their WLFI was deposited into exchanges that day. Another 30 on-chain wallets made their first moves today after holding WLFI for 20 days: two wallets transferred 644.3 billion WLFI (worth $14.19 million) to Binance. These wallets now hold 1 billion WLFI (worth $220 million).

data.title: Bitcoin Exchange Supply Ratio Declines After Fed Cut, Setting Stage For $120,000 Test
data.description:
Earlier this week, the US Federal Reserve (Fed) cut interest rates by 25 basis points, providing the much-required impetus to the economy after a cycle of raising interest rates to keep inflation under check. A cut in interest rates is likely to benefit risk-on assets, including Bitcoin (BTC). Fed Cuts Interest Rate, Bitcoin Supply Ratio Falls According to a CryptoQuant Quicktake post by contributor Arab Chain, the latest data from Binance shows that the interest rate cut has rekindled investors’ interest in BTC. Notably, the exchange supply ratio has declined to 0
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/bitcoin-exchange-supply-ratio-fed-cut-120000/

data.title: Flora Growth Raises $401 Million, Launches ZeroG Treasury Strategy, and Renames to ZeroStack
data.description: Flora Growth Corp. (FLGC), a Nasdaq-listed company, today announced the pricing of its private placement investment in a publicly traded company (PIPE) offering, implementing its Zero Stack treasury strategy. Upon closing, the company expects to change its name to ZeroStack and retain the ticker symbol "FLGC." The offering was led by Solana Financial Strategies' DeFi Dev Corp., with participation from Hexstone Capital, Carlsberg SE Asia PTE Ltd (CSAPL), Dao 5, Abstract Ventures, Dispersion Capital, Blockchain Builders Fund, and Salt. Flora Growth has secured $401 million in funding, consisting of over $366 million in physical digital assets and $35 million in cash and equivalent commitments. The company has entered into a PIPE transaction agreement to purchase and sell shares of the company's common stock (including pre-purchase warrants) at a price of $25.19 per share. The transaction also includes an in-kind contribution valued at $3.00 per 0G token and a partial in-kind loan.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 990 USDT with a 0.49% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Sep 20, 2025, 02:56 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 990 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 990.669983 USDT, with a narrowed 0.49% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Justin Sun: SunPerp will prioritize improving the trading experience, and early users will be rewarded
data.description: Justin Sun, Huobi HTX Global Advisor and founder of TRON, elaborated on the strategic significance of launching SunPerp in the "Boundless Imaginations of the DEX 2.0 Era | Special Theme Space." He stated that from the perspective of a defensive strategy for the public chain ecosystem, the Perp DEX is crucial for TRON. The TRON network boasts the widest range of USDT use cases, and users have a huge demand for perpetual contract trading, making the launch of SunPerp opportune. Despite entering the market relatively late, Justin Sun is confident in SunPerp's development: "We are firmly optimistic about the Perp track and believe that with its excellent product experience and solid underlying services, we can achieve a latecomer advantage." He emphasized that the team's current priority is to focus on product refinement, ensuring smooth trading and market depth, and will continue to introduce more innovative assets to strengthen its foundation. Regarding user-focused incentives, Justin Sun revealed that SunPerp will not introduce points, leaderboards, or airdrops in its initial phase, aiming to prioritize core trading features. But he also made it clear that "as long as the transactions are conducted before the start of future activities, their transaction data will be recognized."

data.title: A 75-year-old man in Hong Kong fell into an ETH investment scam, losing about HK$26.2 million
data.description: Hong Kong police received a report from a 75-year-old local man who claimed to have received a call from someone claiming to be a virtual currency investment expert, who offered him high returns and persuaded him to invest in the virtual currency ETH. The victim followed the instructions and deposited approximately HK$26.2 million worth of virtual currency into six accounts on 19 separate occasions between July 11 and September 9. Hong Kong police stated that the case has been classified as obtaining property by deception and is being handled by the Wan Chai District Criminal Investigation Team 9. No arrests have been made yet. (Hong Kong media Oriental Daily)

data.title: Planet Morning News
data.description: 1. FTX will initiate its third round of creditor repayments, totaling $1.6 billion; 2. BitGo officially submitted its S-1 filing to the U.S. SEC, initiating its IPO process; 3. Grayscale submitted a revised Dogecoin ETF application, while NYSE Arca also sought to amend its Ethereum Trust; 4. Falcon Finance released the FF token economics, with a total supply of 10 billion tokens, 8.3% of which will be used for community airdrops and Launchpad sales; 5. NBA star Durant: Cryptocurrency is the future of the world; 6. WLFI passed a 100% fee repurchase and destruction proposal; 7. The U.S. Treasury Department initiated the drafting of the GENIUS Act rules and opened a public consultation for stablecoin regulation; 8. The three major U.S. stock indices closed higher, while crypto treasury companies saw mixed gains and losses; 9. Federal Reserve Board Governor Milan: Will work to convince other policymakers to cut interest rates more quickly.

data.title: Falcon Finance releases FF token economics, with a total supply of 10 billion, 8.3% of which will be used for community airdrops and Launchpad sales
data.description: Falcon Finance releases FF token economics with a total supply of 10 billion tokens, managed by an independent foundation, and distributed as follows: 35% to the ecosystem, 32.2% to the foundation, 20% to the core team and early contributors, 8.3% for community airdrops and Launchpad sales, and 4.5% to investors.

data.title: Backed By CZ, Aster Token Ignites With 1,650% First-Day Rally
data.description:
Aster’s native token, ASTER, surged 1,650% in its first 24 hours of trading and reached $0. 528, according to platform reports. Related Reading: FalconX Moves 413K Solana Worth $98M – Impact On SOL Price Trading volume for the token in that window was listed at $345 million, and the launch reportedly drew 330,000 new wallets. Rapid User Growth And Liquidity According to on-chain data and platform disclosures, Aster’s total value locked jumped from $660 million to $1 billion shortly after launch
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/altcoin/backed-by-cz-aster-token-ignites-with-1650-first-day-rally/

data.title: A high-risk trader opened a $46.28 million BTC long position with 40x leverage.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, a wallet associated with the address "0x222" (0x089...B999) deposited $2 million in USDC and opened a long BTC position with 40x leverage, currently valued at $46.28 million. Previously, this high-risk trader (0x222) opened a long position on BTC with 40x leverage and 120,000 SOL with 20x leverage on September 18th. Furthermore, a whale (0x4F9...2eFe) deposited $4.12 million in USDC and increased its long BTC position with 5x leverage, currently valued at $20.56 million.

data.title: The whale who made over $76 million in profit from the ETH band bought another 16,000 ETH
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, a whale/institution (0 x 2 aa...da 2), which has profited $76.05 million through ETH swing trading, bought 16,569 ETH at $4,484 early this morning, valued at $74.29 million. The whale had bought 18,000 ETH at $4,487 the day before and sold 10,000 ETH at $4,600 yesterday.
